name: Maxen
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Scavenger
uniqueTraits.text: When Maxen knocks out an enemy champion, remove their banner from the battlefield.

ultimate.name: Bird Shot
ultimate.text: Remove up to 3 Gearhawks from the battlefield. This skill has +2 {accuracy} and +2 {damage} for each Gearhawk removed.

plotSkills.name: Tinker
plotSkills.text: The Gearhawks may immediately make a recruit action and may gain a boon of your choice.

clashSkills.name: Piercing Round
clashSkills.text: This skill has -1 {accuracy} for each hex between Maxen and his target. Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

clashSkills.name: Shrapnel Shot
clashSkills.text: This skill has -1 {accuracy} and -1 {damage} for each hex between Maxen and his target. Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex away from Maxen.

traits.name: Eagle Eye
traits.text: At the end of the Gearhawks' activation, you may choose a friendly champion adjacent to a Gearhawk model. That friendly champion gains {accuracy_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Migration
plotSkills.text: You may place each Gearhawk up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

plotSkills.name: Talon Rake
plotSkills.text: This skill gains +1 {accuracy} for each Gearhawk adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Migration
clashSkills.text: You may place each Gearhawk up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

clashSkills.name: Dive Bomb
clashSkills.text: This skill gains +1 {accuracy} for each Gearhawk adjacent to the target.
